title: ¿Se acabó su amistad?
promptImage: A cinematic drama scene inside a small cafe during heavy rain, both characters visible from the start. Clara sits on the left in a dark red sweater, posture stiff, hands wrapped around a coffee cup without drinking. Julia sits on the right in a charcoal gray coat, leaning forward with tense shoulders, eyes locked on Clara. Rain streaks across the large window behind them, soft warm interior lighting contrasts with the cold blue tones outside, shallow depth of field, reflective table surface, intimate but fragile atmosphere, no dialogue.

characters.name: Clara
characters.description: dark red sweater, emotional and sincere, hurt but trying to stay composed

characters.name: Julia
characters.description: charcoal gray coat, proud and guarded, defensive under pressure

chapters.prompt: Clara (looks down at her coffee, hurt) and say: "I did not expect you to talk about me like that." Julia (leans forward, trying to stay calm) and respond: "I was angry... I did not mean all of it." Clara (raises her eyes slowly, disappointed) and say: "But you said it to everyone." Julia (touches the edge of the table, tense) and respond: "I know... and I am sorry for that." Clara (shakes her head, voice quiet) and say: "It is not only that. I do not know if I can trust you now." Julia (goes still, staring at her) and respond: "Are you saying this friendship is over?" Clara (holds the cup tighter, fighting emotion) and say: "I do not know... but it is breaking."

Clara (looks down at her coffee, voice tight) and say: "I honestly never thought you would talk about me like that behind my back." Julia (leans forward, tense but controlled) and respond: "I was upset, okay? I said things I should not have said." Clara (looks up, disappointment clear on her face) and say: "That would be easier to believe if you had not said them to half the room." Julia (rests her hand on the table, uneasy) and respond: "I know... and I regret it. I really do." Clara (shakes her head slowly, trying not to cry) and say: "The problem is not just the words. It is the fact that I do not trust you the same way anymore." Julia (goes quiet for a second) and respond: "So what are you saying... that we are done?" Clara (holds her cup tighter, voice low) and say: "I am saying we are closer to the end than I ever imagined."

Clara (stares into her coffee, trying to steady herself) and say: "You know what hurts the most? Not even what you said... it is realizing you were fully capable of saying it." Julia (leans forward, rain flickering across the window behind her) and respond: "I was angry, Clara. I lashed out. I am not pretending it was okay, but that is what happened." Clara (looks up, eyes glossy but sharp) and say: "You did not just lash out. You humiliated me in front of people who were supposed to be our friends." Julia (presses her fingers to the table edge, guilt creeping in) and respond: "I know... and I hate that I did that." Clara (shakes her head, voice quieter now) and say: "Yeah, but once trust cracks, you do not just glue it back together like nothing happened." Julia (goes still, swallowing hard) and respond: "So this is it?" Clara (wraps both hands around the cup, barely holding herself together) and say: "I think this is the part where it starts falling apart."

title: ¡Solo quedan segundos!
promptImage: A cinematic action scene during a night chase, both characters visible from the start hidden behind a damaged car. Lucas crouches on the left in a black tactical jacket, posture low and alert, one hand braced against the car door. Mia crouches on the right in a dark green bomber jacket, breathing fast, clutching a small backpack close to her chest. Flashing headlights sweep across wet pavement, sparks and distant sirens in the background, high contrast lighting, shallow depth of field, intense motion implied, urgent atmosphere, no dialogue.

characters.name: Lucas
characters.description: black tactical jacket, decisive and focused, used to pressure

characters.name: Mia
characters.description: dark green bomber jacket, brave but nervous, quick-thinking under stress

chapters.prompt: Lucas (peeks over the car, urgent) and say: "We have less than one minute... we need to run now." Mia (holds the backpack close, breathing fast) and respond: "Run where? They are everywhere." Lucas (points toward the alley, focused) and say: "There. If we reach that alley, we can escape." Mia (looks toward the lights, afraid) and respond: "They will see us." Lucas (lowers his voice, steady) and say: "Only if we wait too long." Mia (takes a breath, trying to be brave) and say: "What if we do not make it?" Lucas (looks at her directly, determined) and respond: "Then we do not stop. Ready?" Mia (nods quickly, tense) and say: "Ready."

Lucas (peeks over the car, voice sharp) and say: "We have less than a minute left... if we move, it has to be now." Mia (clutches the backpack tighter, breathing hard) and respond: "Now? Lucas, they are all over the street." Lucas (points toward the alley, staying focused) and say: "That alley is our only shot. If we reach it before the next car turns, we are out." Mia (glances toward the headlights, panicking) and respond: "And if they spot us halfway there?" Lucas (drops lower behind the car, calm but urgent) and say: "Then we keep going. Standing here is worse." Mia (forces herself to look at him) and say: "You are asking me to trust a terrible plan." Lucas (meets her eyes, determined) and respond: "I know... but it is the only plan we have."

Lucas (peeks over the hood, tracking the headlights) and say: "We are out of time... when that next car swings left, we run, and we do not look back." Mia (hugs the backpack against her chest, adrenaline in her voice) and respond: "That is your plan? Sprint into the open while half the city is chasing us?" Lucas (points toward the alley without taking his eyes off the street) and say: "It is not a good plan, but it is the gap we have. Miss it, and we are done." Mia (glances toward the alley, jaw tight) and respond: "You make this sound slightly more horrifying every second." Lucas (drops lower, listening to the sirens) and say: "Good. Fear keeps you fast." Mia (lets out a shaky breath, then squares her shoulders) and say: "Wow... weirdly motivating." Lucas (turns to her, focused) and respond: "Three seconds. Be ready to move."

title: Eso no debías tocar
promptImage: A cinematic fantasy scene in an enchanted forest at sunset, both characters visible from the start. Elara stands on the left in a flowing pale blue cloak, posture cautious, one hand slightly raised toward a glowing object. Rowan stands on the right in a dark brown leather tunic with a forest green cape, shoulders tense, holding the forbidden artifact close but not fully trusting it. Golden twilight filters through ancient trees, floating particles in the air, moss-covered roots, magical glow reflecting on their faces, shallow depth of field, mysterious and dangerous atmosphere, no dialogue.

characters.name: Elara
characters.description: pale blue cloak, wise and careful, sensitive to danger

characters.name: Rowan
characters.description: dark brown leather tunic and forest green cape, curious and impulsive, drawn to forbidden things

chapters.prompt: Elara (stares at the glowing object, alarmed) and say: "Rowan... where did you find that?" Rowan (holds the object closer, trying to sound calm) and respond: "Near the old stone circle. It was hidden under the leaves." Elara (takes one careful step back, worried) and say: "You should not touch it. That object is forbidden." Rowan (looks down at it, fascinated) and respond: "It does not feel dangerous." Elara (raises her hand, voice lower) and say: "That is why it is dangerous." Rowan (glances at her, confused) and respond: "What does it do?" Elara (keeps her eyes on the light) and say: "It wakes things that must stay asleep." Rowan (tightens his grip, uneasy now) and respond: "Then maybe I made a mistake."

Elara (stares at the glowing object, tension in her voice) and say: "Rowan... please tell me you did not take that from the stone circle." Rowan (holds the object up slightly, defensive but curious) and respond: "I found it there, yes, but it was hidden. I thought no one even knew it existed." Elara (takes a slow step back, clearly alarmed) and say: "There is a reason no one is supposed to find it. That object is forbidden." Rowan (looks down at the light in his hands, fascinated) and respond: "It does not look cursed. Actually, it feels almost alive." Elara (raises one hand, voice dropping) and say: "That is exactly what should scare you." Rowan (meets her eyes, unsettled now) and respond: "Then tell me what it does." Elara (keeps staring at the object) and say: "It wakes powers that were buried for a reason."

Elara (goes still at the sight of the glow, dread in her face) and say: "Rowan... please tell me you did not just pull that thing out of the stone circle like it was some harmless souvenir." Rowan (holds the artifact closer, caught between awe and caution) and respond: "I found it buried under the roots. No guards, no warning, nothing. How was I supposed to know?" Elara (takes one measured step back, eyes fixed on the object) and say: "Because anything hidden that well in this forest is hidden for a reason... and this one is forbidden." Rowan (glances down at the light pulsing in his hands) and respond: "That is the strange part. It does not feel evil. It feels... awake." Elara (raises a hand, voice barely above a whisper) and say: "That is not comforting, Rowan. That is exactly how old magic tricks people." Rowan (finally looks at her, unease setting in) and respond: "So what happens now?" Elara (keeps her gaze on the artifact) and say: "Now we find out what you just woke up."

title: Sé que fuiste tú
promptImage: A cinematic crime scene behind a bar at night, both characters visible from the start. Nico stands on the left in a black denim jacket, posture rigid, one hand in his pocket, eyes narrowed with suspicion. Marco stands on the right in a burgundy shirt with rolled sleeves, leaning against the brick wall with forced confidence, but tension visible in his jaw. Neon light spills from the back door, wet alley ground reflecting red and blue tones, trash bins and metal stairs in the background, shallow depth of field, gritty and confrontational mood, no dialogue.

characters.name: Nico
characters.description: black denim jacket, observant and direct, hard to fool

characters.name: Marco
characters.description: burgundy shirt, smooth and defensive, hiding panic under confidence

chapters.prompt: Nico (steps closer, staring at him) and say: "The money is gone... and I know you took it." Marco (leans on the wall, forcing a smile) and respond: "That is a serious thing to say without proof." Nico (keeps his eyes on him, calm) and say: "I saw you near the office before the cash disappeared." Marco (shrugs, trying to stay relaxed) and respond: "Lots of people were near the office." Nico (folds his arms, voice harder) and say: "Yes... but only you left in a hurry." Marco (looks away for a second, tense) and respond: "Maybe I had a reason." Nico (takes one more step, lowering his voice) and say: "Then give me one." Marco (swallows, confidence slipping) and respond: "You are not going to like it."

Nico (steps closer, voice controlled) and say: "The cash is missing... and honestly, you are the only person I think took it." Marco (leans against the wall, trying to look unbothered) and respond: "That is a pretty bold accusation for someone who has not shown any proof." Nico (keeps staring at him, unshaken) and say: "I do not need much proof when I saw you coming out of the office right before the money vanished." Marco (shrugs, but his jaw tightens) and respond: "Plenty of people go near the office. That does not mean anything." Nico (folds his arms, expression flat) and say: "It means more when you are also the only one who rushed out the back door two minutes later." Marco (glances away, tension rising) and respond: "Maybe I had something else going on." Nico (leans in slightly) and say: "Great... then explain it."

Nico (steps closer into the neon spill, eyes locked on him) and say: "Let us skip the performance... the cash is gone, and I am standing out here because I know you took it." Marco (leans against the wall, forcing a crooked smile) and respond: "That is a cute theory, but you are still missing one important thing... proof." Nico (keeps his hands still, voice flat) and say: "I saw you coming out of the office right before the envelope disappeared, and then you practically sprinted out the back like the building was on fire." Marco (shrugs, but the tension shows in his jaw) and respond: "Or maybe I just had somewhere to be. You ever think of that?" Nico (folds his arms, not buying it for a second) and say: "Sure... except people with normal errands do not look this nervous when I mention stolen money." Marco (looks away for half a beat, then back) and respond: "You want the truth? Fine... but once I say it, this gets worse."

title: ¿Amigos o algo más?
promptImage: A cinematic teen drama scene at a school party, both characters visible from the start. Ava stands on the left in a bright pink jacket, posture tense, arms crossed while colored party lights hit her face. Mason stands on the right in a light gray hoodie under a blue jacket, leaning closer to be heard over the music, trying to stay calm but clearly bothered. Blurred students dancing in the background, colorful light streaks, cups and decorations around the room, shallow depth of field, youthful but emotionally charged atmosphere, no dialogue.

characters.name: Ava
characters.description: bright pink jacket, expressive and proud, jealous but pretending not to care

characters.name: Mason
characters.description: light gray hoodie with blue jacket, loyal and frustrated, trying to hide his own jealousy

chapters.prompt: Ava (crosses her arms, trying to sound casual) and say: "You were talking to Lily all night." Mason (leans closer, confused) and respond: "Yes... because she came to talk to me." Ava (looks away, annoyed) and say: "You looked very happy about it." Mason (pulls at his hoodie, defensive) and respond: "Why do you care so much?" Ava (glances back at him, hurt) and say: "I do not care... I just noticed." Mason (raises his eyebrows, unconvinced) and respond: "No, Ava... you definitely care." Ava (tightens her arms, voice lower) and say: "Maybe I do not like being ignored." Mason (goes quiet for a second) and respond: "Then maybe this is not only friendship."

Ava (crosses her arms, pretending not to care) and say: "You have been talking to Lily all night... and, honestly, you seemed to enjoy it." Mason (leans closer so she can hear him, confused) and respond: "She came over to me, Ava. It was just a conversation." Ava (looks away, jaw tight) and say: "Sure, but you looked pretty interested for 'just a conversation.'" Mason (pulls lightly at his hoodie, getting defensive) and respond: "Why are you acting like this matters so much to you?" Ava (glances back at him, trying to stay cool) and say: "I am not acting like anything. I just noticed you forgot I was even here." Mason (studies her face for a second) and respond: "That is not true... and also, you sound jealous." Ava (holds his gaze now, quieter) and say: "Maybe I am."

Ava (crosses her arms, colored lights flashing across her face) and say: "So... are you and Lily a thing now, or was tonight just your audition for most obvious flirting in the room?" Mason (leans closer through the music, caught off guard) and respond: "Wow. That is how we are starting this? She talked to me for ten minutes." Ava (looks away, then back, trying to play it off) and say: "Right, and somehow those ten minutes were enough for you to forget your actual best friend existed." Mason (pulls at the edge of his hoodie, frustration rising) and respond: "You do realize people only say stuff like that when they care way more than they want to admit, right?" Ava (meets his eyes, voice dropping) and say: "Maybe I am just tired of pretending I do not notice." Mason (goes still, the noise around them fading for a beat) and respond: "Then maybe we have not been acting like just friends for a while."
